data.name: Owl

abilities.name: Well Spotted
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, chosen opposing character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text: "I say, land who! Er, ho—land ho!"

data.name: Lilo

abilities.name: No Place I'd Rather Be
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if this card is in your discard, you may play her and she enters play exerted.

data.flavor_text: "You can't keep me away from the fun!"

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: We're Pirates, You See
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next Pirate character you play this turn.

data.name: Gopher
data.flavor_text:
"I keep fixin' this same ding-danged hole! I should
start charging overtime, plus 10 percent."

data.name: Simba
data.flavor_text:
"Look at that water, and those birds! Wow. Wait 'til
Timon and Pumbaa see this!"

data.name: Chip

abilities.name: Dale's Partner
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Come on, Dale—this is no time for hanging around!"

data.name: Dale

abilities.name: Chip's Partner
abilities.text: This character enters play exerted unless you have a character named Chip in play.

data.flavor_text: "But Chip, hanging around is what I do best!"

data.name: David

abilities.name: Showing Off
abilities.text: While you have a character named Nani in play, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text: "Grab a board and come on out! Choice waves today."

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Prince Naveen.)

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.name: Prince Naveen
data.flavor_text:
"Dance little friends—fill the air with light and joy.
Achidanza! It is like seeing music come to life."

abilities.name: You Like Gazelle Too?
abilities.text: While you have a character named Gazelle in play, this character gains Singer 6. (This character counts as cost 6 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: The Value of Friendship
abilities.text: While you have a character named Dale in play, this character gains Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.name: Monterey Jack
data.flavor_text:
"There's only one thing I like more than cheese—
nothin'."

data.name: Chip 'n' Dale

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Chip or Dale.)

abilities.name: Search and Rescue
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return a character card from your discard to your hand.

rules: This character counts as being named both Chip and Dale.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Need Some Help?
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, you may ready another chosen character of yours.

data.name: Tiana

abilities.name: Special Reservation
abilities.text: Whenever a character of yours is challenged while this character is exerted, the challenging character gets -3 {Strength} this turn unless their player pays 3 {Ink}.

data.flavor_text:
"The only way to get what you want in this world is
through hard work."

data.name: Grand Councilwoman

abilities.name: Find It!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your other Alien characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "I want an expert on this planet in here now!"

abilities.name: Nuts About Pranks
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put the top 3 cards of your deck into your discard to give chosen character -3 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: I Am So Sorry
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Simba.)

abilities.name: Understand the Balance
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may ready your other characters.

data.name: Kanga

abilities.name: Safe and Sound
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, another chosen character of yours can't be challenged until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"My, you've had an awfully big adventure. Now it's
time to rest."

data.name: Rabbit

abilities.name: Be More Careful
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may remove up to 1 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text: "See? I told you it was dangerous out there!"

data.name: Roo

abilities.name: I'm a Pirate Too!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may give chosen character -2 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Look at all my ships, mama! We're going on the
Azurite Sea!"

data.name: Mr. Litwak

abilities.name: The Gang's All Here
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you play another character, you may ready this character. He can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Come on in. Good to see you."

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Hire a Crew
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Pirate character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Stitch

abilities.name: Need a Hand?
abilities.text: {Exert} — This character gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Always ready in an emergency—usually because
he caused it.

data.name: Good Job!
rules: Chosen character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Be proud of that badge. You earned it."
—Judy Hopps

data.name: I Won't Give In
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Return a character card with cost 2 or less from your discard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: 'Til I reach the end, and then I'll start again

data.name: Rescue Rangers Away!
rules: Count the number of characters you have in play. Chosen character loses {Strength} equal to that number until the start of your next turn.

data.name: Safe and Sound
rules: Chosen character of yours can't be challenged until the start of your next turn.
data.flavor_text: "Here I am, mama!"

data.name: Naveen's Ukulele

abilities.name: Make It Sing
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character counts as having +3 cost to sing songs this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"I love this instrument! I strum, everyone dances."
—Prince Naveen

data.name: Pooh Pirate Ship

abilities.name: Make a Rescue
abilities.text: {Exert} — Return a Pirate character card from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text: The friendliest ship on the Azurite Sea.

data.name: Scrump

abilities.name: I Made Her
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Her head is too big. So I pretend a bug laid eggs in her
ears..."
—Lilo

abilities.name: Friends Forever
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever a character is banished while here, gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Bring It Home, Kid!
abilities.text: When you move a character here from a location, you may banish this location to gain 3 lore and draw 3 cards.

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: Soul Collector
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever one of your other characters is banished, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"You could say I'm big on the catch, not so much
on the release."

keywords.name: Challenger +1
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +1 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Zim Zabberim Bim
abilities.text: Your other characters gain Challenger +1.

data.name: Genie
data.flavor_text:
"For the indecisive sailor we have three, count 'em,
three ships in one! It sails, it flies, it juliennes fries!
All for the low price of just one wish."

data.name: Sisu

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text: "I'm a water dragon. This is water. It's sort of my thing."

data.name: The White Rose

abilities.name: A Wealth of Happiness
abilities.text: When you play this character, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"You can learn a lot of things from the flowers..."
—Alice

data.name: Juju

abilities.name: Bees' Knees
abilities.text: When you play this character, move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
"Juju! You get yourself out of that there magic, you bad boy!"
—Mama Odie

data.name: Rafiki
data.flavor_text:
"The signs, they never lie. The snake thinks he's
planned for everything...Oh, ho, ho! He forgot
about the owl. There's hope yet!"

data.name: Tinker Bell

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
She zips through the waves without a drop of
water touching her.

abilities.name: I'll Get You!
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may exert chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
The Carpenter's stomach growled as he clenched
his hammer tight...

data.name: Iago

abilities.name: Guess Who
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand.

data.flavor_text: "You think you can get rid of me that easy?!"

data.name: The Walrus
data.flavor_text:
...While the Walrus finished off the lot, down to
the final bite.

data.flavor_text: "Oh, does that feel good!"

data.name: Madam Mim

abilities.name: Oh, Bat Gizzards
abilities.text: {Exert} — Gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"I'll give you a sporting chance. I'm mad about
games, you know."

data.name: Yzma

abilities.name: Feel the Power
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have fewer than 3 cards in your hand, draw until you have 3 cards in your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"One of these has got to work. Let's see what
happens."

abilities.name: I've Got to Do Everything Around Here
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, you may move up to 2 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.name: Peter Pan

abilities.name: Gotcha!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, exert chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text: "You're not getting away from me this time!"

abilities.name: We'll Have to Look Into This
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top card of chosen player's deck. Put it on top of their deck or into their discard.

data.name: A Very Merry Unbirthday
rules: (A character with cost 1 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each opponent puts the top 2 cards of their deck into their discard.
data.flavor_text:
Now blow the candle out, my dear
And make your wish come true

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Genie.)

abilities.name: Your Reward Awaits
abilities.text: Whenever you play a card, draw a card.

abilities.name: Forbidden Treasure
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, put all the cards in your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Making Magic
rules: Move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"That's got some zang to it!"
—Mama Odie

data.name: Lose the Way
rules: Exert chosen character. Then, you may choose and discard a card. If you do, the exerted character can't ready at the start of their next turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Well, when one's lost, I suppose it's good advice to stay
where you are until someone finds you."
—Alice

data.name: Seeking the Half Crown
rules: Draw 2 cards.
For each Sorcerer character you have in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this action.
data.flavor_text:
"I see the other half, in the Inklands. Quick, my tiny
companion! Fetch me that crown!"
—Jafar

abilities.name: Back, Fools!
abilities.text: Whenever one of your opponents' characters, items, or locations is returned to their hand from play, gain 1 lore.

data.name: Mad Hatter's Teapot

abilities.name: No Room, No Room
abilities.text: {Exert} — Each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their discard.

data.flavor_text:
Alice: "My goodness, the tea missed the cup!"
Mad Hatter: "No, no, my dear—the cup missed the tea!"

abilities.name: Faith and Trust
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Challenger +2 and Evasive until the start of your next turn. (While challenging, they get +2 {Strength}. Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.name: Fairy Ship
data.flavor_text:
Legends say that whenever something goes missing, it's been taken to
build the fairy ships of the Azurite Sea.

abilities.text: At the start of your turn, you may move 1 damage counter from chosen character here to chosen opposing character.

abilities.name: Here's the Best Part

data.flavor_text: "You're going to love this!"

abilities.text: Whenever this character is challenged, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text: "...but by night...I am also a school mascot."

data.flavor_text:
Every Lost Boy has a favorite hiding spot. Tootles
has twelve.

data.flavor_text:
"By Jove, he must be around here somewhere.
Basil! Basil! Shout if—aaahhh!"

Loyal butler, training target, helicopter pilot—and
completely unflappable.

"Hmm. Footprints from a large...owl? With
droplets of water? Clearly some avian menace
has crossed the Azurite Sea and absconded with
the crown!"

data.flavor_text:
"A promotion! It's about time someone recognized
my natural leadership skills!"

data.flavor_text:

side of that maze, I just know it!"

data.name: Mertle Edmonds
data.flavor_text: "Get out of my way before I run you over."

keywords.name: Ward

uncharted waters.

abilities.text: When you play this character, if an opponent has an item in play, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Sleek yet strong...These inkrunners are an
extraordinary feat of engineering."

keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Basil.)

abilities.name: Twists and Turns
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may pay 1 {Ink} to have chosen opponent choose and discard a card.

data.name: Olivia Flaversham
data.flavor_text:
She had searched high and low in the Illuminary
for any hint of Basil. Instead, she found something
completely unexpected...

data.name: Bend to My Will
rules: Each opponent discards all cards in their hand.
data.flavor_text: "At last! This is where your luck runs out!"

data.name: Prepare to Board!
rules: Chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn. If a Pirate character is chosen, they get +3 {Strength} instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Bring me the treasure, bring me that ship, and bring
me Peter Pan!"
—Captain Hook

data.name: Heffalumps and Woozles
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen opposing character can't quest during their next turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: If honey's what you covet, you'll find that they love it

data.name: Mosquito Bite
rules: Put 1 damage counter on chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
"Don't move. A mosquito has chosen me as her perch.
She's so...beautiful."

data.name: You Came Back
rules: Ready chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
"Nobody gets left behind."
—Stitch

abilities.name: Happy Face
abilities.text: This item enters play exerted.

abilities.name: Destroy!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose one: • Banish chosen item. • Banish chosen damaged character.

data.flavor_text: The best way to keep in touch with those you're looking for.

—Alistair Krei

abilities.text: Whenever a character is challenged while here, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

Even the smallest mouse can make the biggest
difference.

data.name: Vanellope von Schweetz

abilities.name: As Ready As I'll Ever Be
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if this character is at a location, draw a card and gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: "Almost got it!"

data.name: Michael Darling
data.flavor_text:
"Hoist the colors! Prepare to fight! Teddy bear at
the ready!"

data.name: Aladdin
data.flavor_text:
Finding your way through the Azurite Sea takes a
stout heart, plenty of courage, and more than a
little luck.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text: "Just what we needed—a new place to fight bugs."

"Port, Abu! Port! To the left! ABU! The other way!"
—Aladdin

data.flavor_text:
"Golly, this looked a lot easier from the ship. But I
know I can make it—the crew is counting on me!"

data.flavor_text:

race!"

"You wanna tell me I don't know what I'm doing? I
know I don't!"

the island at last?

finally getting paid for it.

abilities.name: Teeth and Ambitions
abilities.text: When you play this character, deal 2 damage to chosen character of yours to deal 2 damage to another chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"It's for the greater good. I'm sure you understand."
—Scar

data.name: Thievery
rules: Chosen opponent loses 1 lore. Gain 1 lore.
data.flavor_text:
Apples, gems, magic lamp ...Abu's not picky as long
as there's something worth stealing.

data.name: Lead the Way
rules: Your characters get +2 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
"We have what it takes to find our way through this
maze, together! Hold on—we're going in!"

data.name: The Islands I Pulled from the Sea
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Search your deck for a location card, reveal that card to all players, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
data.flavor_text: So what can I say except...you're welcome

data.name: Energy Blast
rules: Banish chosen character. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Did you really think I would fight fair?"
—Jafar

abilities.name: Take It For a Spin
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.name: Gold Coin

abilities.name: Sparkly Access
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready chosen character of yours. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Sweet mother of monkey milk! A gold coin!"
—Vanellope von Schweetz

abilities.name: A Suitable Weapon
abilities.text: Your damaged characters get +1 {Strength}.

abilities.name: Tiny Thieves
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if you have a character here, all opponents lose 1 lore and you gain lore equal to the lore lost this way.

abilities.name: Familiar Ground
abilities.text: Characters get +1 {Strength} while here.

abilities.name: Safe Haven
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if you have a Pirate character here, gain 1 lore.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.name: Aunt Cass

abilities.name: Happy to Help
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen Inventor character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "All right, geniuses, let's feed those hungry brains."

data.name: Gadget Hackwrench

abilities.name: Brainstorm
abilities.text: Whenever you play an item, this character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Golly, a perfect wingnut! There's about a million
uses for that!"

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gadget Hackwrench.)

abilities.name: Mechanically Savvy
abilities.text: While you have 3 or more items in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play Inventor characters.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Run Interference
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, another chosen character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Favorable Chance
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an item card, you may play that item for free and it enters play exerted. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

abilities.name: Time to Upgrade
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may return one of your items to your hand to pay 2 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.name: Pleakley

abilities.name: Reporting For Duty
abilities.text: When you play this character, put chosen character of yours into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"As the duly appointed representative for the
Galactic Council, I volunteer for this assignment!"

data.name: Hiro Hamada

abilities.name: Sweet Tech
abilities.text: {Exert} — Search your deck for an item card or a Robot character card and reveal it to all players. Shuffle your deck and put that card on top of it.

data.flavor_text: "A couple more tweaks and I've just about...got it!"

abilities.name: Eat Anything
abilities.text: When you play this character, exert chosen opposing item. It can't ready at the start of its next turn.

abilities.name: Out to Lunch
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: Sour Bill

abilities.name: Unpalatable
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"You want to go in there? Fine. If you do, you won't
come back out."

data.name: Nick Wilde

abilities.name: Nice to Have a Partner
abilities.text: While you have another character with Support in play, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: "Glad you could make it."

abilities.name: Blades of Fury
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item. Its player gains 1 lore.

abilities.name: Quick Reflexes
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

keywords.name: Shift 1
keywords.text: (You may pay 1 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Nick Wilde.)

abilities.name: You Can't Touch Me
abilities.text: While you have an item in play, this character can't be challenged.

data.name: Gadget Hackwrench
data.flavor_text:
"All the clues pointed to an island, but I never
thought I'd see it on a map. Golly, this is
incredible! I mean, the island actually exists, so it's
technically credible—but still! This is amazing!"

data.name: Dr. Delbert Doppler
data.flavor_text:
"Of course! It all makes perfect sense. That's why
my old star charts are useless. Every star in the sky
here is different!"

data.name: Tadashi Hamada

abilities.name: Let's Get Back to Work
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} and +1 ⛉ for each item you have in play.

data.flavor_text:
"I'm not giving up on you. You don't understand this
yet, but people need you."

abilities.name: I Need to Upgrade All of You
abilities.text: Your other Inventor characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Shape the Future
abilities.text: {Exert} — Look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.name: Tadashi Hamada

abilities.name: Someone Has to Help
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown. Then, put this card into your inkwell facedown.

data.flavor_text: His work lives on.

abilities.name: Fully Charged
abilities.text: If you have an Inventor character in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: You Said ‘ow’
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 1 damage from another chosen character.

abilities.name: The Treatment Is Working
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever he quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from another chosen character of yours. Gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed this way.

data.name: Yokai
data.flavor_text:
"You are all brilliant scientists and inventors. Think
of what you could do with this little device. How do
you push the boundaries of what is possible?"

data.name: Hiram Flaversham
data.flavor_text: He'll find a way to make anything mouse-sized.

keywords.name: Shift 6
keywords.text: (You may pay 6 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Yokai.)

abilities.name: Neurotransmitter
abilities.text: You may play items named Microbots for free.

abilities.name: Technical Gain
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, draw a card for each opposing character with 0 {Strength}.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Ahoy!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, another chosen character of yours gets +1 {Lore} and gains Ward until the start of your next turn.

data.name: We Could Be Immortals
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Your Inventor characters gain Resist +6 this turn. Then, put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 6.)

data.name: Sail the Azurite Sea
rules: This turn, you may ink an additional card. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
You need a good plan and even better luck to make it
across these treacherous waters.

data.name: Helping Hand
rules: Chosen character gains Support this turn. Draw a card. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)
data.flavor_text:
"When you're making the world a better place, every
little thing helps."
—Judy Hopps

data.name: Prepare Your Bot
rules:
Choose one:
• Ready chosen item.
• Ready chosen Robot character. They can't quest for
the rest of this turn.

abilities.name: 10,000 Medical Procedures
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose one: • Remove up to 1 damage from chosen character. • If you have a Robot character in play, remove up to 3 damage from chosen character.

abilities.name: Limitless Applications
abilities.text: You may have any number of cards named Microbots in your deck.

abilities.name: Inspired Tech
abilities.text: When you play this item, chosen character gets -1 {Strength} this turn for each item named Microbots you have in play.

abilities.name: Here You Go
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from each of your characters. Draw a card.

abilities.name: Planning Session
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if you have a character here, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Welcome to the Lab
abilities.text: Inventor characters get +1 ⛉ while here.

abilities.name: Push the Boundaries
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if you have a character here, gain 1 lore.

data.name: Kakamora

abilities.name: A Little Help
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have another Pirate character in play, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character or location.

data.flavor_text:
"They're very good at making trouble."
—Maui

abilities.name: Head Coconut
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card to deal 1 damage to chosen character or location. If you discarded a Pirate character card, deal 3 damage instead.

abilities.name: Come On, Come On, Come On!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, this character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.name: Mr. Big

abilities.name: Reputation
abilities.text: This character can't be challenged by characters with 2 {Strength} or greater.

data.flavor_text: "You've done me a great service."

data.name: Mr. Smee

abilities.name: Good Catch
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text: "Captain Hook'd like a word with ya."

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mr. Smee.)

abilities.name: Raise the Colors
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of your other Pirate characters in play.

data.name: Mullins

abilities.name: Fall in Line
abilities.text: While you have a character named Mr. Smee in play, this character gains Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"Anything for you, Mr. Smee! Except me share o'
the plunder..."

data.name: Kohut
data.flavor_text:
"Ma'am! I am a highly trained instrument of
tactical superiority! Maybe we could find someone
else for the gruntwork! Ma'am!"

data.name: King Hubert
data.flavor_text:
"I told you we'd find an island eventually! Excellent
navigating. Yes, yes, I'm quite proud. Now, a toast
to our success!"

data.name: Hercules

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
"That maze wasn't so bad! Let's see what this
island has in store for us."

data.name: John Silver

abilities.name: Hunk of Hardware
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character can't challenge during their next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"At the end of the day, it's the simplest tools that
come through for you in a pinch."

data.name: Mr. Arrow

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"We're holding steady, Captain. Despite this wind.
And these waves."

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Jim Hawkins.)

abilities.name: Battle Stations
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character or location.

data.name: Tuk Tuk
data.flavor_text:
Raya: "Nothing gets past Tuk Tuk. Nothing."
Sisu: "Except butterflies! Oh, and birds!"
Raya: "Fine. Most things don't get past Tuk Tuk."

data.name: Billy Bones

abilities.name: Keep It Hidden
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may banish chosen item or location.

data.flavor_text: "He'll be comin' soon. Can't let them find this."

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Good Boy
abilities.text: While this character has no damage, he gets +4 {Strength}.

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Backup
abilities.text: Your characters named Pluto gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"Gee, Donald was right—it's spooky out here in
the dark!"

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Think About What's Best
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.name: Gantu
data.flavor_text:
"Strength in numbers is overrated. I prefer my own
strength."

data.name: Wreck-It Ralph

abilities.name: I Wreck Things
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen item or location to gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text: "I'm very good at what I do. Probably the best I know."

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Level Up
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.

abilities.name: Driveling Galoots
abilities.text: This character can't be challenged by Pirate characters.

abilities.name: Everything Shipshape
abilities.text: While being challenged, your other characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Jafar

abilities.name: You'll Get What's Coming to You
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"The broken crown's power is formidable, but not
enough. With both halves of the Hexwell Crown, I could
rule all of Lorcana!"

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named John Silver.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: Don't Just Sit There!
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to each opposing ready character.

data.name: Hot Potato
rules:
Choose one:
• Deal 2 damage to chosen character.
• Banish chosen item.
data.flavor_text:
"This is not going to end well."
—Pleakley

data.name: I'm Still Here
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. Draw a card. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.name: Twin Fire
rules: Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may choose and discard a card to deal 2 damage to another chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
"I got 'em!"
"No, I got 'em!"

data.name: Ambush!
rules: {Exert} one of your characters to deal damage equal to their {Strength} to chosen character.
data.flavor_text: Pirates will use any advantage they can get.

data.name: Unfortunate Situation
rules: Each opponent chooses one of their characters and deals 4 damage to them.

abilities.name: Symbol of Royalty
abilities.text: Your Prince and King characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Royal Search
abilities.text: {Exert} — Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Prince or King character card, you may put that card into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

abilities.name: Handle with Care
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Bodyguard until the start of your next turn. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.name: Sunglasses

abilities.name: Spycraft
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: The coolest accessory for top agents.

abilities.name: Secret Weapon
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, deal damage to chosen character or location equal to the number of characters here.

abilities.name: Federation Decree
abilities.text: While you have an Alien or Robot character here, this location can't be challenged.

data.name: Chip 'n' Dale

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Chip or Dale.)

abilities.name: Search and Rescue
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return a character card from your discard to your hand.

rules: This character counts as being named both Chip and Dale.

abilities.name: Special Reservation
abilities.text: Whenever a character of yours is challenged while this character is exerted, the challenging character gets -3 {Strength} this turn unless their player pays 3 {Ink}.

abilities.name: Bring It Home, Kid!
abilities.text: When you move a character here from a location, you may banish this location to gain 3 lore and draw 3 cards.

keywords.name: Shift 7
keywords.text: (You may pay 7 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Rafiki.)

abilities.name: Astral Attunement
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Feel the Power
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have fewer than 3 cards in your hand, draw until you have 3 cards in your hand.

abilities.name: Back, Fools!
abilities.text: Whenever one of your opponents' characters, items, or locations is returned to their hand from play, gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Distant Shores
abilities.text: Whenever one of your Pirate characters quests while at a location, draw a card.

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Basil.)

abilities.name: Twists and Turns
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may pay 1 {Ink} to have chosen opponent choose and discard a card.

data.name: You Came Back
rules: Ready chosen character.

abilities.name: Come On, Let's Do This
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may ready another chosen character of yours. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Swash Your Buckles
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action, this character gets +1 {Strength} and +1 {Lore} this turn.

Search your deck for a location card, reveal that card to all players, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
